question: What is the color of the circular plastic game board? A. Black B. Grey C. Blue D. Dark Blue
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand with dark skin tone manipulates dark translucent glass marbles on a blue circular plastic game board. The board features a grid of circular indentations arranged in a cross-shaped pattern. The hand places marbles into empty holes or picks them up from the indentations. The game board rests on a grey concrete or light-colored textured surface.

Describe the specific actions the hand performs on the marbles and board throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a hand places a dark blue marble into a hole; at 8s, the hand picks up a black marble from the grid; at 12s, the hand picks up another dark blue marble; at 14s, the hand places a marble into an empty slot; at 18s, the hand places a marble into an empty hole.
